control.description-key: A modern, configurable file attachment control for Power Apps with file type restrictions, flexible styling, and structured output.

property.name: allowedFileTypes
property.description-key: Comma separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g. pdf,docx)

property.name: maxFiles
property.description-key: Maximum number of files allowed.

property.name: maxFileSizeMB
property.description-key: Maximum file size allowed per file (in MB).

property.name: buttonLabel
property.description-key: Text for the upload button.

property.name: attachedFiles
property.description-key: Attached files output as a table.

property.name: buttonFillColor
property.description-key: Fill color for the upload button

property.name: buttonFontColor
property.description-key: Font color for the upload button

property.name: buttonBorderColor
property.description-key: Border color for the upload button

property.name: buttonSize
property.description-key: Button size (Small, Medium, Large)

property.name: buttonVerticalAlign
property.description-key: Button vertical position (Top, Bottom)

property.name: buttonHorizontalAlign
property.description-key: Button horizontal alignment (Left, Center, Right, Justify)

property.name: removeIconColor
property.description-key: Color for the remove icon

property.name: buttonIconName
property.description-key: Fluent UI icon name for upload button

property.name: showFileInfoList
property.description-key: Show/hide the file info list

property.name: buttonTooltip
property.description-key: Tooltip for the upload button

property.name: disabledFillColor
property.description-key: Fill color for button when disabled

property.name: disabledFontColor
property.description-key: Font color for button when disabled

property.name: borderStyle
property.description-key: Border style: Solid, Dashed, Dotted, None

property.name: borderThickness
property.description-key: Border thickness in pixels

property.name: borderColor
property.description-key: Border color

property.name: reset
property.description-key: Reset the control

property.name: buttonBorderRadius
property.description-key: Button Border radius in pixels

property.name: errorMessage
property.description-key: The last validation error message

property.name: showErrorMessage
property.description-key: Show or hide the inline error under the button

event.name: OnError
event.description-key: OnError Event to trigger Error Actions
